sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) i.q. מֹוט No. 2, a bar, staff, 1Ch 15:15. מֹטֹות הָעֹל bars of a yoke, Lev 26:13 Eze 34:27, a bent piece of wood put round the neck of a bull, with the two ends fastened to a wooden yoke.

(2) a yoke itself, Jer 27:2 28:10 , 12 Jer 28:12 Eze 30:18. Metaph. Isa 58:6, Isa 58:9.
